is_alien.name: is_alien
is_alien.description: The person does not provide proof of Belgian nationality.

qualifies_as_alien.name: qualifies_as_alien
qualifies_as_alien.description: The person legally qualifies as an alien under the statutory definition (does not prove Belgian nationality).

is_third_country_national.name: is_third_country_national
is_third_country_national.description: The person is not a Union citizen and not a person enjoying the Community right of free movement.

is_in_illegal_stay.name: is_in_illegal_stay
is_in_illegal_stay.description: The person is present on the territory without meeting the conditions for entry or stay.

is_subject_to_removal_procedure.name: is_subject_to_removal_procedure
is_subject_to_removal_procedure.description: The person is subject to a removal procedure.

is_subject_to_international_protection_p.name: is_subject_to_international_protection_procedure
is_subject_to_international_protection_p.description: The person is subject to a procedure for the granting of international protection.

is_subject_to_responsible_member_state_p.name: is_subject_to_responsible_member_state_procedure
is_subject_to_responsible_member_state_p.description: The person is subject to a procedure for determining or transferring to the Member State responsible for examining the application for international protection.

individual_examination_performed.name: individual_examination_performed
individual_examination_performed.description: An individual examination has been performed for the person.

no_residence_application_after_illegal_e.name: no_residence_application_after_illegal_entry
no_residence_application_after_illegal_e.description: The person has not submitted a residence application following illegal entry or during illegal stay, or has not made an application for international protection within the statutory time limit.

used_false_information_or_documents.name: used_false_information_or_documents
used_false_information_or_documents.description: The person has used false or misleading information, false or falsified documents, committed fraud, or used other unlawful means in a relevant procedure.

does_not_cooperate_with_authorities.name: does_not_cooperate_with_authorities
does_not_cooperate_with_authorities.description: The person does not cooperate or has not cooperated with authorities responsible for enforcement or supervision of regulations concerning access, residence, establishment, and removal.

declared_unwillingness_to_comply_with_me.name: declared_unwillingness_to_comply_with_measure
declared_unwillingness_to_comply_with_me.description: The person has made clear they do not wish to comply with, or has already failed to comply with, a transfer, refusal-of-entry, removal, entry ban, less coercive, liberty-restricting, or equivalent Member State measure.

subject_to_unlifted_entry_ban.name: subject_to_unlifted_entry_ban
subject_to_unlifted_entry_ban.description: The person is subject to an entry ban in the Kingdom and/or another Member State that has neither been lifted nor suspended.

submitted_new_application_immediately_af.name: submitted_new_application_immediately_after_negative_decision
submitted_new_application_immediately_af.description: Immediately after a decision refusing entry, residence, or terminating stay, or a refusal-of-entry or removal measure, the person submitted a new residence or international protection application.

concealed_prior_fingerprints_in_other_st.name: concealed_prior_fingerprints_in_other_state
concealed_prior_fingerprints_in_other_st.description: When questioned, the person concealed that they had already provided fingerprints in another State bound by European regulations on determining the responsible Member State.

submitted_multiple_applications_with_neg.name: submitted_multiple_applications_with_negative_outcome
submitted_multiple_applications_with_neg.description: The person has submitted multiple applications for international protection and/or residence in the Kingdom or other Member States, resulting in negative decisions or no residence permit.

concealed_prior_international_protection.name: concealed_prior_international_protection_application
concealed_prior_international_protection.description: When questioned, the person concealed that they had previously submitted an application for international protection in another State bound by European regulations on determining the responsible Member State.

came_for_purposes_other_than_stated_appl.name: came_for_purposes_other_than_stated_application
came_for_purposes_other_than_stated_appl.description: The person declared, or it appears from their file, that they came to the Kingdom for purposes other than those for which they submitted an application for international protection or residence.

subject_to_fine_for_manifestly_unlawful_.name: subject_to_fine_for_manifestly_unlawful_appeal
subject_to_fine_for_manifestly_unlawful_.description: The person is subject to a fine for submitting a manifestly unlawful appeal to the Council for Alien Law Litigation.

is_identified_alien.name: is_identified_alien
is_identified_alien.description: The person qualifies as an identified alien under the statutory definition.

holds_valid_travel_document.name: holds_valid_travel_document
holds_valid_travel_document.description: The person is in possession of a valid travel document, valid passport, or valid identity document.

recognised_as_national_by_country_author.name: recognised_as_national_by_country_authority
recognised_as_national_by_country_author.description: The person has been recognised as a national by the national authority of their country, which has declared itself willing to issue a laissez-passer.

falls_within_nationality_category_for_mi.name: falls_within_nationality_category_for_ministerial_laissez_passer
falls_within_nationality_category_for_mi.description: The person falls within the category of nationalities for which the minister may personally issue a laissez-passer.

at_least_one_absconding_criterion_met.name: at_least_one_absconding_criterion_met
at_least_one_absconding_criterion_met.description: At least one of the objective criteria listed in paragraph 2 for risk of absconding is met for the person.

subject_to_relevant_procedure.name: subject_to_relevant_procedure
subject_to_relevant_procedure.description: The person is subject to a removal procedure, a procedure for the granting of international protection, or a procedure for determining or transferring to the responsible Member State.

risk_of_absconding.name: risk_of_absconding
risk_of_absconding.description: There is a current and real risk of absconding for the person, established following individual examination and based on at least one objective criterion.
